prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度仍偏热（2024年，推荐），电子信息/通信高热推荐，金融/财经/经济分化观望；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万，按近年物理类占比约70%估算，物理类考生约20.93万人，较2025年20.72万略有增加；北京外国语大学位于北京市，对贵州省物理类考生属于跨省报考；该校在贵州物理类招生人 数较少（2025年约8人），无特殊地域偏好。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4752 → 4578 → 11247 → 7479 → 9976, showing drastic fluctuations. In 2021–2022, rankings stabilized in the 4500–4800 range, but in 2023, they sharply dropped to 11247 (a gap-like backward shift), rebounded to 7479 in 2024, and then shifted back to 9976 in 2025, overall showing a fluctuating backward trend, with a baseline of about 9976 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category: 2021: 9 students → 2022: 8 → 2023: 6 → 2024: 7 → 2025: 8 → 2026: 12, with a 50% increase in 2026 compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years, indicating significant expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking. As a top-tier language institution, its Physics Category majors are mainly interdisciplinary fields such as computer science, big data, and finance, which are not its traditional strengths. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative, involving the academic fraud incident of postgraduate exam influencer Tian Jing. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 39th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.17 million. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of a significant drop in the admission rankings for minor language majors, indirectly affecting the application psychology of Physics Category candidates. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline, but the Physics Category majors (Computer Science and Technology, Big Data Management and Application, Finance, Business Administration, etc.) have low relevance to the university's core disciplines, and the advantage of discipline evaluation has limited appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science remains relatively hot (2024, recommended), electronic information/communication is highly recommended, finance/economics is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Guizhou Gaokao is about 299,000, with Physics Category accounting for approximately 70% in recent years, resulting in about 209,300 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase from 207,200 in 2025. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Guizhou Physics Category candidates. The university's enrollment in Guizhou for Physics Category is small (about 8 students in 2025), with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9976, the significant 50% expansion in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (expansion leads to a larger ranking number), the low relevance of Physics Category majors to the university's core strengths (language), and the still high but competitive popularity of computer-related majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13100, with a range of 12600–13600.

Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 12600) can aim for Tier 1 majors (English, Law); those in the middle of the range (12600–13600) are advised to focus on Tier 2 computer-related majors and Finance, balancing employment prospects and admission probability; those near the upper end of the range (outside 13600) can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. BFSU's Physics Category majors are mainly interdisciplinary, with Computer Science and Technology (Language Intelligence/Digital Intelligence Technology) as a distinctive direction worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated from approximately 541 to 1719 to 1061 to 1452 to 1647, showing an overall trend of moving backward after fluctuations. The ranking was optimal in 2021 (541st), significantly dropped to 1719th in 2022, rebounded to 1061st in 2023, and then hovered between 1452 and 1647 from 2024 to 2025, with a baseline of about 1647th in 2025. Over the past three years (2023–2025), the cumulative backward shift was about 586 places, indicating a slight cooling in application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province has been continuously expanding: 9 students in 2021 → 11 in 2022 → 12 in 2023 → 15 in 2024 → 17 in 2025 → 21 in 2026, with a 23.5% increase in 2026 compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years. Expansion means a larger pool of competitors, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (stable in the 73–82 range in recent years). It is known as the 'Cradle of Diplomats' and holds a top-tier position among language universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving the scandal of postgraduate entrance exam teacher Tian Jing's false academic credentials (her BFSU graduation information was revoked), which has somewhat impacted the university's image. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal of significantly lower admission positions for minor language majors (low attention). Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 39th overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.17 million, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), directly corresponding to all language majors at the university. Non-language majors such as Law, Journalism and Communication, and Business Administration, although not individually rated as A-class disciplines, benefit from BFSU's platform advantages and have relatively high application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Guizhou candidates. The number of students admitted from Guizhou increased from about 11 in 2021 to about 17 in 2025. The social popularity of foreign language majors is generally in a 'wait-and-see' state (2024), affected by the development of AI translation technology and changes in the job market, leading to a decline in the attractiveness of language majors. Law is relatively hot (2024, with differentiated wait-and-see). The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Gaokao is approximately 299,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 89,700 (based on a recent proportion of about 30%), roughly flat compared to 90,100 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1647, a significant 23.5% expansion in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (expansion → larger ranking number), generally lukewarm social popularity of foreign language majors, and a somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that competition in 2026 will slightly ease, with the ranking moving backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1910, with a range of 1850–1970.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 1910, range 1850–1970. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1850) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship language majors (Spanish Joint Program, Japanese Advanced Translation, French, etc.). Those in the middle of the range (1850–1970) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (German, Diplomacy, Law), balancing interest and admission probability. Candidates near the upper end of the range (outside 1970) may consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net. BFSU's A+ discipline in Foreign Language and Literature is extremely strong, and language majors overall are of very high quality; it is recommended to prioritize core language directions.
